decision: Use a boundary package import seam for bet records in this wave while keeping the legacy bet shape compatible enough for incremental migration.
reason: This establishes repository-owned translation points and lets touched domain packages stop importing socialpredict/models directly without forcing a full test-fixture rewrite across all math packages in one task.
impact: Boundary seams now exist across markets, bets, math, analytics, and auth-adjacent code; broader legacy test fixture migration remains follow-up work.
